description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent attached double garage on the left side. The facade features expansive rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior combines white upper walls with a lower section of reddish-brown brick, creating a visually appealing contrast. The front yard is landscaped with several palm trees and a wide driveway leading to the garage and main entrance. The main entryway is centrally located, flanked by large windows and a small porch area. The roof includes a fenced terrace or balcony area, adding to the contemporary design.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, brick and white exterior, attached double garage, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, double garage, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the house, side windows, and continuation of the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, fenced terrace, and the back of the garage structure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garage's side, additional windows, and the green lawn with palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small porch, flanked by large windows, and a wide driveway leading to the door; minimal decorative elements.
